content.en:
Another period of time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally raised his cultivation to the three-dimensional realm, and also created several killing moves, and his strength was definitely comparable to that of a four-dimensional powerhouse.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to emerge in the Desolate Heaven Sect, which was also to attract ~ the attention of Baili Qingye.

I saw that he continued to challenge one three-dimensional level powerhouse after another, easily defeated them, and even overstepped several fourth-dimensional level elders.

Because of his powerful combat power, coupled with the short cultivation time, the sect master of the Desolate Heaven Sect was shocked and ready to cultivate Ye Tian.

And when he challenged these powerhouses, he also copied the high-level divine dimensional talent, which also made his cultivation speed skyrocket many times.

"Senior Sister Baili, I want to challenge you!"

Ye Tian came to Baili Qingye's mansion and said.

Baili Qingye sensed Ye Tian's arrival and frowned slightly.

She is already a five-dimensional powerhouse, and it won't be long before she will definitely be able to step into the six-dimensional realm, but Ye Tian is just a three-dimensional powerhouse, and he dares to challenge her?

However, he is also a genius demon disciple in the sect, so teach him a good lesson, and let him know that a three-dimensional powerhouse is nothing at all.

"Okay, I promise!"

Immediately.

Ye Tian fought with Baili Qingye.

With just one move, Ye Tian was knocked away.

"Senior sister, I admit defeat!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

Baili Qingye originally wanted to teach Ye Tian a lesson, but he didn't expect Ye Tian to admit defeat so quickly and so simply.

"Okay, Senior Brother Yang Wu, three-dimensional is nothing, even if I am in the five-dimensional realm, it is still not worth mentioning in the entire Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth. "Baili Qingye Road.

"Thank you for the reminder!"

Ye Tian retired.

At this time, he was very excited.

Because he copied an extremely high divine talent from Baili Qingye.

【Talent: Shenwei (Seven Stars)】

Seven-star Divine Talent, this should be the talent division level of this Divine Talent, although I don't know what grade it belongs to, but it is definitely much higher than the top-level Divine Talent.

He copied the seven-star level divine talent and integrated it into his body, making his talent skyrocket.

After going back.

Ye Tian began to cultivate the secret method of Tianwei, and a large amount of divine power poured into his body, helping him quickly refine his body and make his body more and more tough.

Three years of divine maintenance have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian stepped into the seven-dimensional realm, and his physical body was already extremely terrifying, and in this divine dimensional world, he could cross the void with his physical body.

And within the Desolate Heaven Sect, the most powerful one before was the Seven Dimensions.

However, in terms of combat effectiveness, he had already surpassed the seventh-dimensional realm, and was definitely comparable to the eighth-dimensional powerhouse.

"It's time to leave, the Desolate Heaven Sect is still too weak, and there is no inheritance left, the Divine Dimension Secret Book here is too ordinary, I must obtain better and more Divine Dimension Secret Books, so that I can create a more powerful Heavenly Dimension Secret Method!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Before leaving.

Ye Tian visited Baili Qingye again, and he copied the seven-star divine dimensional talent from Baili Qingye, allowing him to quickly improve to the seven-dimensional realm.

So, he made up for the hundred miles of green leaves.

"Senior Sister Baili!"

Ye Tian came to visit.

"Senior Brother Yang Wu, are you going to challenge me again?"

Baili Qingye, who was already a six-dimensional powerhouse, asked.

"No, I want to leave the Desolate Heaven Sect, Senior Sister Baili is right, the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth are very big, I shouldn't be bound here. "

"What, you want to leave the Desolate Heaven Sect?" Baili Qingye hurriedly persuaded: "Senior Brother Yang Wu, your strength is too weak, without the protection of the Desolate Heaven Sect, it is too dangerous to leave here, and if you encounter a little danger, you may die." "

"Senior Sister Baili, I have the means to protect myself!"

"Before leaving, I want to give my senior sister a secret method!"

Before Baili Qingye could react, Ye Tian was already close, and he pointed at Baili Qingye's eyebrows.

Rumble!!!

The secret method of Tianwei is infused into its will.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian said goodbye, his body flashed, and his body crossed the void and left.

"The flesh crosses the void, and the seven-dimensional powerhouse !!!"

Baili Qingye was hit.

She has become a sixth-dimensional powerhouse, but she didn't expect that Senior Brother Yang Wu has already stepped into the seventh-dimensional, and it doesn't seem to be an ordinary seventh-dimensional.

She had never felt such a powerful aura from her father.

Immediately, she flipped through the Tianwei secret method in her mind, and her heart was extremely excited.

"Such a powerful Divine Dimension Secret Method, the most powerful Divine Dimension Secret Method of the Desolate Heaven Sect at present is far inferior to it! With it, I can definitely quickly ascend to the seven-dimensional realm, and in the future, I am expected to achieve the ten-dimensional realm and revitalize the Desolate Heaven Sect!"

But she thought of Ye Tian again, and thought of herself again, did she really want to stay in the Desolate Heaven Sect all the time?

"When I step into the seven-dimensional realm, I will also leave the Desolate Heaven Sect!"

Baili Qingye said secretly.

......

After leaving the Desolate Heaven Sect, Ye Tian prepared to go to Xuantian City in the north of the Desolate Heaven Sect.

Xuantian City is the main city of the Xuantian Domain, and it is extremely prosperous here.

There are a large number of sects in the Xuantian Domain, and the Desolate Heaven Sect is only one of the small sects.

And the powerhouses of Xuantian City are like clouds, and the powerhouses of the seventh, eighth, and ninth dimensions don't know how many.

After a period of time, Ye Tian arrived in Xuantian City, and he also encountered many dangers on the way, but fortunately, with his combat power comparable to that of an eight-dimensional powerhouse, he still came to Xuantian City alive.

After coming to Xuantian City, Ye Tian first rented a mansion to live in, and then began to collect more Divine Dimension cheats.

Many shops here sell Divine Dimension Cheats, and there are many auctions that also auction off the top Divine Dimension Cheats.

Ye Tian used all his abilities and wealth to buy a large number of Shenwei cheats in a short period of time.

After that, he began to refine the Heavenly Secret Method.

Another period of time passed, and Ye Tian successfully perfected the Tianwei Secret Method, which made the power of the Tianwei Secret Method skyrocket.

If the previous Tianwei Secret Method could allow him to easily ascend to the ten-dimensional realm without any major bottlenecks, then now he can cultivate to the fifteen-dimensional realm without encountering any big bottlenecks.

"Very good, let's collect resources to cultivate the Tianwei Secret Method, and improve to the ten-dimensional realm as much as possible!"

He knew very well that in the Xuantian Domain, only the ten-dimensional realm could be regarded as a real powerhouse, and only then could he have enough power to protect himself.

And this cultivation has passed a full thirty god years.

this day.

Ye Tian's cultivation broke through again, reaching the ten-dimensional realm, and he created a lot of powerful killing moves, and his combat power was almost invincible in the ten-dimensional realm.
